focused on travel nurse staffing.

Likewise.

can give a quick update on our end for the conditions hub.

Does that work?

So we will get, like, we're not blocked on the 250 PSEO pages, Dave.

Okay, perfect.
So in that way, then we.
can just start drafting all that content, and it can be loaded and ready, and then as soon as your team has, like, hits go on moving over the condition hub, we can push content into those nodes.

Like, so that we can start preloading things, and then we'll, like, and then when you guys are ready, we'll set it live.
Okay, cool.
So we have, we'll have the content on deck to put in as soon as the template is done for the hub.
For the blog template, I just want make sure Dave, you and Ilya are squared away on, like, the last couple things I think you had in terms of questions.
Yeah, I'm pretty sure I answered all of those questions today, and we approved all of that.
In terms of the condition hubs, if, I think we have on our, like, timeline, it's, like, content migration to new category structure starting, like, the first week of August.

And then two, it's like our condition hub and then mapping all that stuff out.
So I can get started on that and that's like an action on my end, but we'd probably have to coordinate on like the category structure and a map of like everything of how it all looks.
So we're aligned on the URLs going forward.
Okay.
That sounds good.
think second week, it sounds like if you, we parallel everything second week, once the template for the hub is done, you should be good to go on that side.
Okay.
Cool.
Anthony, we were just chatting conditions hub and the blog template.

in the office.
August.
then for the blog stuff, Dave and Elia, we're already kind of wrapping things up today on last minute comments.
Okay.
With respect to the local LPs, are we on track to have 250 pages live by the end of the month still?
Okay.
Yeah.
I'll have a sample for you guys, like a preview of one city, and then today, like now.
And then once you guys green like that, we will just start cranking out the 250 based on population of cities in the States you guys are in.
Okay.
And how's Kirkland doing with the Prismac API workflow?
Yeah.
Go ahead, Baird, and Mitch.

Right now of two of those cities.
And we just want to see the preview before we hit publish.

Amazing.
Sorry, I know that was probably on the agenda, but it's what I'm anxious about.
appreciate the update.

Yeah.
Okay, great.

And then, Jess, we also have the two editorial pieces that you finished, and then Nebraska is going live today.

And then the two editorials will be published.

Okay.
Great.
Well, those are all the updates.
mean, this can be a 10-minute meeting if we want it to be, just because we know what we're pushing on, and we're trying to get it all moved forward.
But is there any...
Anything else that you guys want to talk about?
So high level, big, big update on our end.
This is my last week at Innerwell personally.
Yeah, sorry.
Kind of shocking, shocking news.
Wish we were able to share it with a little bit more notice.
The good news is I'm not turning into a pumpkin.
I will still be available via Slack and email and supporting the team through the transition.
So there's also going to be a consultant named Noah who's coming in to manage things through the transition.

So we'll get that intro set up.
I've already gone through the SEO timeline and kind of what the plan is with her.
So she's up to speed.
Undoubtedly, she'll have some questions.

I'm sure he introduced himself at this point.
Did you?
Yeah.
Okay, great.

So I think he is amazing firepower to have added to this little pod here.
So please, you know, as Will and Noah get up to speed, you know, make sure that they are, you know, they've got access to everything they need.
Make sure they're, you know, like ping them to keep them in the loop.
And, you know, please help me manage the transition as smoothly as possible.
Awesome.
See you more.
That's good.
Yeah.
Yeah.
That's, that makes sense.
So will, and will, will you be the project manager going forward or will the, the consultant be the project manager?
So like, who are we, who should we like address updates to?
How are we thinking about stakeholders?
Yeah, I mean, I think initially, just I know that this week, Noah is still kind of getting onboarded.

So as not to totally overwhelm her, you should feel free to send updates and project management stuff my way initially.
When we feel like she's got her sea legs under her a little bit, maybe we can affect a transition for her to then start running the project, if that makes sense.
Yeah, okay.
And just, yeah, we'll make sure that everything, we're ready to answer like another deep dive if we want to do that.
But if you want to just give us a heads up ahead of if she's going to join the next meeting or when she'll join, we'll make sure that that's like carved out in the agenda.
Awesome.
I think we'll get her looped into these weekly calls as quickly as possible.
So, yeah.
Whatever the next instance is, we'll make sure she's joined.
Yeah, she heads up based in Israel.
I'm not sure what her flexibility is to work later or what her hours will look like steady state.
We haven't talked about that.
I'm sure her and Lisa have.

Will and Akina, there's probably going to be a few recurring meetings we have to move around to accommodate her schedule.
Yeah, it's a good call out.
Looks like seven hours ahead.
So maybe we can move it up a bit.
Yeah.
Sweet.
Okay.
Well, Anthony, it's been a pleasure.
Thanks for helping us turn the ship around.

Yeah, I look forward to it.
Like I said, in the meantime, I'll still be around for a while.
So, you know, I'll be plugged in and, you know, here to answer questions.

Okay.
Awesome.
Cool.
It's been great looking with Anthony.
Yeah, likewise, everybody.
Hopefully our paths cross again.
Yeah.
Thank you, guys.
Thanks, guys.

Speak soon.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Innerwell and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy, content migration, and team changes.](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Conditions hub timeline shifted to mid-August; blog template approved](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [250 local landing pages on track for end-of-month launch](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Anthony leaving Innerwell; Noah (consultant) and Will (product lead) taking over SEO project management](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [Content migration and 301 redirects can proceed before Condition Hub completion](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

## Topics

### Conditions Hub and Blog Template Update

  - [Conditions hub completion estimated for mid-August (2-week delay)](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Blog template finalized and approved](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [250 SEO pages to be published in next two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Content generation for blog can start immediately](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Category structure and URL mapping coordination needed](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)

### Local Landing Pages Progress

  - [250 pages on track for end-of-month launch](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Sample preview of one city to be provided immediately](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Prismic API workflow nearly complete; preview functionality being added](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)

### Content Updates

  - [Two editorial pieces finished](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Nebraska and Kentucky pages going live soon](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Two topic groups to be published](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)

### Team Changes at Innerwell

  - [Anthony leaving Innerwell this week](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [Noah (consultant) joining to manage transition](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Will McCalpin (product lead) to assist with project continuity](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Weekly meeting time may need adjustment for Noah's Israel time zone](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)

### Project Management Transition

  - [Will to handle updates initially as Noah onboards](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [Noah to potentially take over project management once acclimated](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [Anthony to remain available via Slack and email during transition](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jess to provide sample preview of local landing page for approval](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Dave to start content migration to new category structure in early August](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Coordinate category structure and URL mapping between teams](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Introduce Noah to GrowthX team in next week's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Consider adjusting weekly meeting time to accommodate Noah's schedule](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Continue with content generation for blog and condition hubs](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Proceed with 301 redirects and content migration before Condition Hub completion](https://fathom.video/share/zmnVYPdEHWptm-2vdvXKpE41UBTGP15s?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

action_items.description: Start content migration to new category structure. Coordinate w/ Innerwell on category structure & URL mapping
Send sample/preview of 1 city for local LP pages to Innerwell for approval
Send updated timeline for category structure & condition hub changes to Innerwell team
Manage SEO project updates/comms. Intro Noah to team next week. Prep for her questions re goals/plan/reporting
Adjust recurring meeting times to accommodate Noah's Israel time zone (7hrs ahead)
